moments.author: Pete Hegseth
moments.quote: Authorizing annual testosterone deficiency screening for service members 30+ to ensure you operate at your absolute best.
moments.why: A provocative health‑policy tweak from the defense chief that’s sparking debate among men about masculinity, wellness, and military readiness.

moments.author: Pete Hegseth
moments.quote: Screening troops for low testosterone raises skepticism—'Not a performance drug,' say doctors.
moments.why: Doctors pushing back immediately, fueling widespread conversation among men on forums about hormone science and overreach.

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.why: A cryptic post by the AI industry’s top figure—mysterious, minimal, yet causing a wave of speculation among tech‑obsessed men.
